title: Interaction Canceller
description: Stop accidental interactions! Automatically bypass chests, villagers, and mounts to prioritize using your items (food, potions, pearls) during intense PvP or gameplay. Fully customizable with a modern search-enabled UI.
body:
# ✨ Interaction Disable Features
> **Block targeted interactions** – Choose exactly which blocks (chests, furnaces, hoppers) or entities (villagers, horses, boats) to ignore when you have a usable item in your hand.
> 
> **Forced item use** – When an interaction is canceled, the mod automatically forces your character to use the item in hand (gold apples, potions, pearls) instead of opening the block or entity interface.
> 
> **Modern search GUI** – Tabbed configuration menu with real-time filtering to find and toggle specific blocks or entities instantly. Customize your experience on the fly.
>
> **Persistent configuration** – Settings are saved in a JSON file and reloaded every time you launch. Your blocklist is always ready when you need it.

## 📸 Screenshots
![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0401a0a59b2a8236a6b75e56249f51419b4d1682_0.webp)
> **Config Screen** – Searchable list with checkboxes for Blocks and Entities, with modern Minecraft UI styling.
> 
> In-game – Successfully eating a Golden Apple while right-clicking a protected Ender Chest or Villager.

## 🔧 Requirements

> ```
> Fabric Loader ≥ 0.15.0
> 
> Fabric API
>  
> Java 21 
> ```

## 🎮 How to use
> Install the mod and Fabric API.
> 
> Open the configuration screen with O (default key, changeable in Controls).
> 
> Use the tabs to switch between Blocks and Entities.
> 
> Search and select the blocks or entities you want to skip (click anywhere on the row to toggle).
> 
> Hold a usable item (food, potion, pearl, bow) and right-click a blocked target – you will skip the interface and use your item instead.
> 
## ⚠️ Disclaimer
> This mod is client-side only and does not modify game files or network packets in a way that should be detectable. However, some servers may have rules regarding interaction manipulation.
> 
> Use this mod at your own risk. I am not responsible for any bans or other sanctions applied by server administrators. Always check the rules of the servers you play on before using any client-side modifications.
> 
## 🐛 Bug reports & suggestions
> Send me dm discord:
> ```
> marcellesa
> ```
